routing_rationale: Per curmudgeon c1 review of EXP-255: substance of design is sound; only execution-layer bugs needed correction. Curmudgeon c1 explicitly recommends spot-check (NOT full re-review) after rework. EXP-261 corrects all four cited holes (FC1+FC2 anchors, FC1 verification gate, ds- prefix on new classes, dark-mode pulse via CSS variable) plus the audit honesty issue (hole #4) and the fold-estimate derivation (hole #6). Holes #5 (pulse color) implemented; #7 (textnum asymmetry) deferred per curmudgeon non-blocking framing.
preflight_commands: grep -c 'class="ds-scorecard ds-sc-hero"' build-scripts/generate-html.js  # MUST return 1 (FC1 anchor present)
grep -c '.ds-sc-domains{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}' build-scripts/generate-html.js  # MUST return 1 (FC2 anchor present)
fail_loud_directive: If exact_string_replace returns no-match on FC1 or FC2, treat as HARD FAILURE. Do NOT continue with downstream verification — this is the structural failure mode that bit EXP-255.
summary: EXP-261 is the curmudgeon-corrected reissue of EXP-255 (Overview hero rework). Substance preserved (thesis-led hero, eclipse badge, deferred Items 3/4); execution-layer bugs corrected (find anchors now use ds- prefix, verification gate fixed, all 11 new classes + 1 keyframe renamed with ds- prefix, dark-mode pulse color via CSS variable). load_bearing_content_audit corrected to honestly acknowledge "zero falsifications" phrase loss; rhetorical work carried by "Survive scrutiny: 0" figure. Find-anchor verification: byte-exact match against current build-scripts/generate-html.js confirmed.
